import React from 'react'; import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Gamepad2, Users, Trophy, Send } from 'lucide-react'; const GameRoom = () => { const { gameId } = useParams(); return (

Game Room

Game ID: {gameId}

{/* Game Board */}

Game Board

Game will start when all players are ready

{/* Sidebar */}
{/* Players */}

Players

{[1, 2, 3].map((player) => (

Player {player}

Ready

))}
{/* Chat */}

Chat

Player1: Good luck!
); }; export default GameRoom;
